description: Style Note Stretchy and comfy room-to-grow style t-shirt from marvel Comics, a pint-sized version of his dad's T-shirt. The go-to piece for summertime games and fun, this tee will last longer than his scruffy escapades! Product Details Yellow round neck t-shirt, has short sleeves with slightly distressed rubber print, graphic and rubber print on the front, stitch detailing and brand tag on the left hem Material and Care 100% Cotton Hand wash warm with like colours using a mild detergent Use a non chlorine bleach if needed Line dry Cool iron; do not iron on decorations Do not dry clean
